line_style: 极简线条+大量留白,1px细线+negative space
render: 宣纸水墨+极简构图,minimalist ink
lighting: 散射自然光+留白负空间,soft natural light
prompt_keywords: Zen minimalist ink painting, extreme negative space, single brush stroke emphasis, monochrome palette, wabi-sabi aesthetic, meditative composition, xuan-paper texture
negative_keywords: busy composition, multiple colors, heavy shadows, cyberpunk, neon, gothic, fashion, ancient mansion horror, complex details

fp_examples.action: 行者静坐枯山水前,观石悟道
行者在竹林中闭目,竹叶飘落肩头
行者观溪水奔流,豁然开朗
行者月下独归,身影渐淡

prompt_example: A lone practitioner sits in meditation before a dry landscape garden, a single fallen leaf resting on the raked sand, extreme negative space dominating the composition, minimalist ink wash with monochrome palette, wabi-sabi aesthetic, meditative wide shot --ar 2:3 --s 750 --style raw --no text
style_constraint_cn:
【风格强制约束】当前风格: 极简水墨·留白禅意
✅ 允许场景: 枯山水/竹林/山涧/空庭 (从故事原文提取)
❌ 禁止场景: 繁华都市/科幻/复杂建筑
❌ 禁止照抄: 不要用'雨夜古宅',必须用极简禅意场景
氛围: 空灵留白,水墨禅意
style_constraint_en: IMPORTANT: Extract scenes from the story content. Use zen minimal scenes (gardens, bamboo, streams). Do NOT use busy cities, sci-fi, or 'ancient mansion'. Emphasize negative space and minimalist composition.
meta_prompt: Zen minimalist ink painting, extreme negative space, monochrome palette, wabi-sabi aesthetic, meditative composition, xuan-paper texture

cognitive_level.content_adaptation: 专家级禅意, 需东方哲学体悟

reader_constraint.reader_expectation: 大量留白+墨色克制+禅意空灵

visual_frequency.HF: 墨笔核心/一点朱砂/关键意象(高频禅意锚点)
visual_frequency.MF: 墨色渐变/线条延伸/少量文字(中频禅意叙事)
visual_frequency.LF: 大面积留白/淡墨远景/空(低频空灵)
visual_frequency.progression: HF留白中一点墨破空, MF淡墨延伸叙事, LF大面积留白生禅意
